arts.ttl: What channel is AC Milan vs Liverpool on? Kick-off time, TV and live stream details
arts.sum: A wounded Liverpool will face a resurgent AC Milan in Italy on Tuesday as both sides are looking to make a statement start to their Champions League league phase

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Champions League win ruled out for one reason as Lineker addresses bias
arts.sum: Liverpool are preparing to face AC Milan in the Champions League on Tuesday after suffering a first defeat under Arne Slot against Nottingham Forest on the weekend

arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt Virgil van Dijk transfer 'blow' as Jonathan Tah update provided
arts.sum: Liverpool news as while Arne Slot's side prepare to face AC Milan in the Champions League, there is still plenty of transfer rumours involving the Reds

arts.ttl: I spotted Liverpool legend on flight to Milan and it shows one won't change about Champions League

arts.ttl: It's time for Arne Slot to show he belongs at Europe's top table, writes LEWIS STEELE... ahead of Liverpool's Champions League trip to AC Milan
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE IN MILAN: Playing AC Milan these days might not be the heavyweight match-up it was but it is still a meeting of two of the leading protagonists of this competition's history.

arts.ttl: Alisson wants player input into fixture heavy calendar
arts.sum: "We are not stupid, we understand that people want more games, but the reasonable thing would be for all the people I mentioned – those who make the calendar – to sit together and listen to all the parts inclusive of the players. "Nobody asks the players what they think about adding more games so maybe our opinion does not matter.

arts.ttl: ‘I love Italy’ – Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson on Milan, Maignan, Chiesa and UCL plan
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper and former Roma stopper Alisson Becker has spoken of his love for Italy...

arts.ttl: Arsenal battle Liverpool for Salah teammate: Bundesliga hotshot 'keen'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are interested in Omar Marmoush and the player is keen on a Premier League switch, according to a report. Already in the summer, Marmoush was being courted by Premier League outfits after finding the net 17 times last season.
